title: Italian Panna Cotta with Blackberry Sauce
ingredients: ¼ cup cold water (for softening gelatin)
instructions: Split vanilla bean and scrape seeds.
Combine vanilla seeds, pod, cream, milk, and sugar in a saucepan.
Soften gelatin sheets in ¼ cup cold water for 5 minutes.
Remove gelatin sheets and squeeze out excess water.
Remove vanilla bean from cream mixture and stir in gelatin until dissolved.
Pour mixture into lightly rinsed molds or ramekins.
Cover and refrigerate about 3 hours, until set.
Mix strained blackberry purée with powdered sugar and vanilla extract.
Spoon blackberry sauce over top and garnish with toasted pistachios.
notes: Place gelatin sheets in cold water for several minutes to soften before using
Panna cotta can be made up to one day ahead and refrigerated until serving
